config.prompt: Analyze why some early modern states developed durable public credit systems while others repeatedly defaulted.

capacity_order_note: Capacities run in the supplied order. The default is descending so later smaller-cache timings receive any OS-page-cache warming; this is conservative when judging larger caches.

runs.selected_text: The divergence in public credit systems during the early modern period (roughly 1500–1800) is one of the most significant topics
